programme.title: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Charlie Sheen, Michael Biehn and Bill Paxton are three of America's finest Navy commandos. Sent to rescue the crew of a U.S. aircraft carrying Stinger missiles seized by Mideast terrorists, they're thrust onto the frontline of an explosive conflict!

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In the ravaged near-future, a brutal motorcycle gang rules the road, terrorizing innocent civilians. But they underestimate one cop: Max (Mel Gibson). When the bikers brutalize Max's family, they send him into a mad frenzy and a need for revenge!

programme.title: Coffy
programme.desc: Pam Grier stars as Nurse "Coffy" Coffin, a one-woman vigilante force, out to even the score with those who have hooked her sister on drugs. Using her feminine wiles and deadly weapons, Coffy sets about ridding the streets of society's scum.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: Pam Grier portrays one of the screen's first action heroines with humor, sensitivity and steely determination. This electrifying revenge thriller explodes with all the sex appeal and cooler-than-cool attitude of its irresistible leading lady.

programme.title: Blind Rage
programme.desc: They don't need to see to steal! They're five unstoppable blind men. They can hear your heartbeat, smell your fear, and almost taste $15 million in secret CIA loot. Only one man stands in their way. He's the ultimate mercenary, and he doesn't know when to quit. They may be close to the perfect crime, but they'll never know what hit them.

programme.title: Hell Up In Harlem
programme.desc: Recovering from an onslaught of bullets that would have killed a lesser man, the Godfather of Harlem, Tommy Gibbs, is back and is out for revenge against the sleazy New York District Attorney (Gerald Gordon) who had set up the hit-gone-wrong.

programme.title: Truck Turner
programme.desc: The great Isaac Hayes stars in this powerful, pull-out-the-stops crime thriller that pulsates with high-octane energy and nonstop suspense as Truck Turner tracks a sadistic pimp through the mean streets of Los Angeles. Nichelle Nichols also stars.

programme.title: Black Caesar
programme.desc: The brutal assault at the hands of a racist cop will inform the life of Tommy Gibbs (Fred Williamson, "Hammer"), who will grow up to become the reigning head of Harlem�s black mafia in "Black Caesar."

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Two killers are hiding where no one will ever find them...behind their badges! Tupac Shakur and James Belushi are two corrupt police detectives caught in a dangerous web of deceit in this gritty, smart and tough action thriller.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: When police officer Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) learns that his childhood friend has become the prime suspect in a murder case, he also discovers that he's the only one who feels that his friend was framed to protect the local tourism business.

programme.title: Out Of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington is caught in a web of intrigue as he investigates the murder of a woman he was seeing...and all the evidence points to him.

programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: At Close Range
programme.desc: A farm boy (Sean Penn) looking for excitement finds himself on a collision course with his smooth-talking gang leader father (Christopher Walken) in this "powerfully disturbing" (Newsweek) tale based on the story of real-life killer Bruce Johnston.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Robert De Niro, Jean Reno and Stellan Skarsgard headline a stellar cast in director John Frankenheimer's action-packed and intelligent spy thriller about a group of for-hire mercenaries out to steal a top-secret briefcase for a mysterious client.
